zh.Hinton Martel, Dorset, England: 英國多瑟特韓丁 馬特爾
zh.Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England: 英國林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比
zh.Midsomer Norton, Somerset, England: 英國薩默塞特米德頌 諾頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lucy de Peverel於大約1290年出生在英國林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比時，她的父親Andrew de Peverel31歲，母親Lucy de Beke26歲。她於大約1310年與Herbert FitzReynold在英國多瑟特韓丁 馬特爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1323年在英國薩默塞特米德頌 諾頓享年34歲。

zh-hans.Hinton Martel, Dorset, England: 英国多瑟特韓丁 馬特爾
zh-hans.Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England: 英国林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比
zh-hans.Midsomer Norton, Somerset, England: 英国薩默塞特米德頌 諾頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lucy de Peverel于大约1290年出生在英国林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比时，她的父亲Andrew de Peverel31岁，母亲Lucy de Beke26岁。她于大约1310年与Herbert FitzReynold在英国多瑟特韓丁 馬特爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1323年在英国薩默塞特米德頌 諾頓享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Peverel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Peverall
meanings: Norman, English: relationship name from Old French Peurel (Latin Piperellus), a diminutive of Old French pevre ‘pepper’ (Anglo-Norman French peivere, Latin piper), originally perhaps used as a nickname on the Continent but used as a personal name in Anglo-Norman England.

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Lucie, the vernacular form of Lucia . It is sometimes assumed that Lucy is a pet form of Lucinda , but there is no etymological justification for this assumption. It was in fairly widespread use in the Middle Ages, and increased greatly in popularity in the 18th century and again in the 1990s. In Ireland it serves as an Anglicized form of Irish Luíseach .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Lucy de Peverel was born about 1290, in Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, her father, Andrew de Peverel, was 31 and her mother, Lucy de Beke, was 26. She married Herbert FitzReynold about 1310, in Hinton Martel, Dorset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1323, in Midsomer Norton, Somerset, England, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lucy de Peverel est née environ 1290, à Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Andrew de Peverel, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Lucy de Beke, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Herbert FitzReynold environ 1310, à Hinton Martel, Dorset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1323, à Midsomer Norton, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lucy de Peverel um 1290 in Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Andrew de Peverel 31 und ihre Mutter Lucy de Beke 26. Sie hat um 1310 in Hinton Martel, Dorset, England Herbert FitzReynold geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1323 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Midsomer Norton, Somerset, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lucy de Peverel è nata il circa 1290 nel Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, Andrew de Peverel, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Lucy de Beke, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Herbert FitzReynold circa 1310, nel Hinton Martel, Dorset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1323, nel Midsomer Norton, Somerset, England, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.Hinton Martel, Dorset, England: イギリスドールセトヒントン マルテル
ja.Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England: イギリスリンコルンシュアイアスパルスビーエレスビー
ja.Midsomer Norton, Somerset, England: イギリスソメルセトミドソマー ノートン
ja.lifeSummary: Lucy de Peverelが約1290年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスパルスビーエレスビーで生まれた時，父Andrew de Peverelは31歳，母Lucy de Bekeは26歳であった。約1310年にイギリスドールセトヒントン マルテルでHerbert FitzReynoldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1323年にイギリスソメルセトミドソマー ノートンで34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lucy de Peverel(이)가 대략 1290년 영국 링코실르 스피스비 레스비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Andrew de Peverel(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lucy de Beke(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1310년 영국 도르세트 인턴 마텔에서 Herbert FitzReynold(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1323년 영국 서머세트 미드소머 노르턴에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Midsomer Norton, Somerset, England: Midsomer Norton, Bro an Hañv, Английн

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lucy de Peverel nasceu aproximadamente 1290, em Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Andrew de Peverel, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Lucy de Beke, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Herbert FitzReynold aproximadamente 1310, em Hinton Martel, Dorset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1323, em Midsomer Norton, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 34 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lucy de Peverel родилась около 1290 г. в местности эресби, спилсби, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Andrew de Peverel было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Lucy de Beke, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Herbert FitzReynold около 1310 г. в местности хинтон мартел, дорсет, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1323 г. в местности мидсомир нортон, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 34 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lucy de Peverel nació aproximadamente 1290, en Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Andrew de Peverel, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Lucy de Beke, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Herbert FitzReynold aproximadamente 1310, en Hinton Martel, Dorset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1323, en Midsomer Norton, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 34 años.
